title: Comfort Ultra Fresh & Protect Sakura Dreams Fabric Conditioner softener with Pro-Fibre Technology Protects Colour and Shape 58 washes (870 ml)
features: Freshness Redefined: Comfort Ultra Fresh & Protect Sakura Dreams Fabric Conditioner provides a multisensory freshness that reawakens all your senses
Ultimate Clothes Protection & Care: Our revolutionary pro-fibre technology protects fibres, locks in colours and helps clothes retain their shape
Enchanting Sakura Dreams Fragrance: This laundry softener has an intense scent that captures the sweet aroma of blooming cherry blossoms carried on a gentle spring breeze
Effective in Short and Cold Cycles: Our laundry conditioner protects the colour, shape and feel of your clothes in various washing conditions
Sustainability: The bottle for this fabric softener contains 100% recycled plastic (excluding cap and sleeve)
Tip for Ultimate Freshness: Pour one full cap into the conditioner compartment of your washing machine
description: Product Description Indulge in a multisensory laundry experience with Comfort Ultra Fresh & Protect Sakura Dreams Fabric Conditioner, giving your clothes ultimate care and protection. This ultra concentrated fabric conditioner is powered by Comfort’s revolutionary pro-fibre technology, which coats each fibre of your clothes to make them stronger and last longer from the first wash*. Our laundry softener works effectively in all washing conditions, including quick or cold washes. Experience bursts of freshness throughout the day thanks to innovative motion-activated technology, releasing an intense fragrance with every move. Let our washing conditioner take you on a stroll under a canopy of blooming cherry trees, filling the air with their sweet, enchanting scent. How to use: For best results, use 1–2 caps per load: 15 ml for a 4–5 kg wash load, 32 ml for a 6–7 kg wash load. For an even more intense fragrance experience, pour Comfort scent booster elixir on top of your fabric softener into the conditioner compartment of your washing machine. Our Comfort bottle contains 100% recycled plastic (excluding cap and sleeve); please recycle both the bottle and the cap. Protect fibres, lock in colours and help your clothes retain shape with Comfort Ultra Fresh & Protect. *When using a full cap. Ingredients 5-15%: Cationic Surfactants . <5%: Perfume, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Citronellol, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Coumarin, Eugenol, Limonene, Pogostemon Cablin Oil, Lactic acid, Sodium Benzoate. Directions Use 15 ml for a 4-5 kg wash load or 32 ml for a 6-7 kg wash load in the rinse cycle dispenser of your washing machine. For ultimate freshness, use one full cap per load. Manufacturer Contact Information Comfort, Freepost ADM1000, London, SW1A 2XX Unilever Ireland, 20 Riverwalk, National Digital Park, Citywest, Dublin 24. See more
